case_title: TOBELER DESIGN VS. SHEILA DALCAMO et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $595.00 FILED BY TOBELER DESIGN AS TO DEFENDANT DALCAMO, SHEILA SCHER, STEVE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-03-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-03-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-03-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (506)
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOBELER DESIGN AS TO DEFENDANT SCHER, STEVE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$60.00) SERVED SEP-27-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCHER, STEVE
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO SHEILA DALCAMO BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF NOV-03-2011 AT 8:30AM.
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOBELER DESIGN AS TO DEFENDANT DALCAMO, SHEILA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-03-2011 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-03-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SCHER, STEVE
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SCHER, STEVE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOBELER DESIGN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCHER, STEVE $595.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $685.00, DEFENDANT SHEILA DALCAMO DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $59.50 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT SCHER, STEVE
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
